name: Home Depot Home Improver Card

welcome_offer.description: No welcome offer; specialized financing for home improvement

earning_rates.notes: No cash back; specialized for project financing

other_benefits.name: Extended Project Financing
other_benefits.description: Longer promotional financing terms for larger home improvement projects

other_benefits.name: Higher Credit Limits
other_benefits.description: Higher credit limits available for qualified applicants

notes: Business/professional version of Home Depot financing card issued by Citi. For contractors and larger home improvement projects. Not a rewards card.
